title: The Impact of Advertising and R&D on Bankruptcy Survival: A Double-Edged Sword

sentence: When suppliers have a substantial stake in a bankrupt firm's debt, advertising can be a crucial factor in determining the company's fate.

title: The Charm of Behavior-Based Pricing: When Consumers’ Taste Is Diverse and the Consideration Set Is Limited
hypothesis_4omini: Behavior-based pricing (BBP) can help firms earn more profits than without it in a horizontally differentiated market, particularly when consumer valuation is low, as lower prices can expand sales to consumers with limited consideration sets, while the opposite occurs when product valuation is high. The difference in prices charged for old and new consumers under BBP decreases with consumer taste diversity if consumer valuation is low, and the reverse is true if consumer valuation is high.
sentence: In a horizontally differentiated market, offering lower prices to new customers can boost sales, but the opposite strategy is effective when products are highly valued.
keywords_4omini: ['behavior-based pricing', 'consumer valuation', 'price competition', 'sales expansion', 'consumer taste diversity']

title: Artificial Intelligence in Utilitarian vs. Hedonic Contexts: The “Word-of-Machine” Effect
hypothesis_4omini: The word-of-machine effect indicates that utilitarian attributes lead to preference for AI recommenders over human recommenders, while hedonic attributes lead to resistance against AI recommenders, with this effect being influenced by the complexity of attributes, number of options, and transaction costs.
